/opt/homebrew/bin/gcc-15 -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_symboltable.dir/test_symboltable.c.o CMakeFiles/test_symboltable.dir/__/zxbc/ast.c.o CMakeFiles/test_symboltable.dir/__/zxbc/compiler.c.o CMakeFiles/test_symboltable.dir/__/zxbc/options.c.o CMakeFiles/test_symboltable.dir/__/zxbc/errmsg.c.o CMakeFiles/test_symboltable.dir/__/zxbc/pyfloat.c.o -o test_symboltable  ../common/libzxbasic_common.a -lm
